title: Thāna Bhawan Heat Wave
lead: Thāna Bhawan is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.37. The city's temperature has reached extreme levels, posing a significant threat to its residents.
body:
The current heat wave in Thāna Bhawan has a score of 10.0/10, indicating a highly unusual and severe event. 
 The city's temperature is expected to remain high, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 10.8 GG, while the Heating Degree Day (HDD) value is 0.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is 43% and the wind speed is 10.6 km/h, which may provide some relief but is not enough to mitigate the heat wave's impact.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave protocols immediately to protect residents and infrastructure.
agri_impact: Crop damage likely due to heat
